_comment: Drop the contents of `mcpServers` into your existing Claude
Desktop config (the file with the same shape) — don't replace
the whole file unless this is your first MCP server.

_comment_context_layer: Context-layer retrieval boosts + decay. All opt-in; remove or set
to 0 to keep the plain hybrid search. salience/profile/decay need
the background scheduler to have run (python -m
mcp_server_evosql.scheduler run) so the data they read exists;
graph edges and entity extraction build inline on save.
